name: Citation Key Sculptor
description: Writes CitationSculptor-style citation keys to the native citationKey field, renames linked child PDFs deterministically, corrects confident PubMed metadata matches, grounds DOI-only PubMed items to native PMID before DOI fallback, and can queue selected records for source-PDF or archival web-page PDF attachment through the shared zotero-smart-capture helper. Independent of Better BibTeX.
